findings.description: Light mode missing --surface and --elevated CSS vars. bg-surface (card.tsx), bg-elevated (sheet.tsx, dialog.tsx) will render transparent in light mode.
SummaryCard trend prop added but never passed by any caller — dead code path, feature incomplete.
_matchingDbCluster renamed with underscore prefix to suppress unused warning instead of removing dead code.
_HeaderSkeleton renamed with underscore prefix — dead code should be removed.
Pod detail sheet 'View Logs' button is non-functional (no onClick handler).
Pod detail sheet shows hardcoded 'No events available for this pod' instead of querying actual pod events.
collapsible.tsx uses double quotes inconsistently with rest of codebase (single quotes).
